feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Work Center Auto Update in PM Order Confirmation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I wanted to know if it is possible to set the work center to auto update when a confirmation is performed.It should assume the work center of the person that performed the actual work and not the planned work center. 

One can plan for a certain skill level but work gets performed by a different one.

entry.title: Functionality of custom transactions (PM & DMS) already available as a standard transaction code?
entry.content:
Hello community,

A client has developed three custom transaction codes (Z) for specific functionalities, as described below:

- ZPM001 (DMS & PM): Displays a list of documents directly related to Plant Maintenance Objects such as orders, notifications, functional locations and equipment (image below)

 

 

 

 - ZPM002: Assigs a SAP user to a "User status", allowing the maintenance planner to identify the originating company area (e.g HR, Maintenance, production...) of a maintenance notification. (See image below)

 - ZPM003 (PM): Enables the mass upload of order confirmations into maintenance orders from a text file. (No image attached).

I would like to check whether there are any existing Standard transaction codes that could replace these functionalities. (My initial assessment is that there aren't).

Thanks in advance,

Sebastián

entry.title: add new field in iw21/iw22
entry.content:
dear Experts,

can you please help me to solve the issue. Needed to add field as it is in the screen. Used QQMA0001 I could not add new field in iw21/iw22.

is there any instructions how to do it ?

entry.title: LMPC for SAP Enterprise Asset Management
entry.content: Can LMPC tool be used for SAP plant maintenance orders or work centers as well? Is there any additional license or configuration required?

entry.title: Missing Customizing settings error is being displayed in IE4N in 2022 Release
entry.content:
hello everyone,

Missing Customizing settings error is being displayed in IE4N in 2022 Release.

i am unable to access this T code in 2022 release.

Thanks & regards

entry.title: Request for SAP S/4HANA Plant Maintenance Fiori Demo Videos & Resources
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I need to demonstrate key SAP S/4HANA Plant Maintenance processes using the Fiori Demo environment, and we already have access to the SAP Demo system. Could anyone help by sharing reference videos, online resources, or YouTube links that include data models and step-by-step demonstrations? Any insights, links, or references to hands-on demonstrations would be highly appreciated! Specifically, we are looking for Fiori demo videos covering the following topics:

L4 Business Process Topics (BPD Topics):

  • Phase In / Phase Out of Equipment
  • Non-Routine Maintenance (Reactive, Minor, Emergency Maintenance)
  • Routine/Preventive Maintenance
  • Refurbishment (In-House / External)
  • Condition-Based Maintenance
  • Maintenance Planning
  • Resource Scheduling Management
  • Shutdown Maintenance
  • Routine Maintenance (Work Clearance Management)                                                                            

    Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Duplicate material output in maintenance order
entry.content:
Hi Guys!!

I have a problem...

 

We have detected two material outputs that refer to the same reservation. The reservation comes from a maintenance order. When reviewing the order, we find that there is only one requirement in position 16 for material outputs.

Reviewing the movement of materials we can see the double output:

But when you see the details of the game it only shows the delivery of 2 Focuses:

In the costes section it shows the deviation of the double output:

The good moviments were made by the same person with a difference of 15 minutes:

An attempt was made to replicate the incident, but it was not possible, since the system does not allow the release of more material than indicated in the order and therefore in the reserve.

Does anyone have any idea what could have happened?

entry.title: How to get abnormal values of measuring point
entry.content:
hello everyone,

how to write a logic to get only abnormal values of any measuring point.

if i create a equipment i. e. 1000000 with measuring point 01 & upper & lower limit is 200 & 100 respectively. if i fill three values 10, 150, & 220. so 10 & 220 is my abnormal values. which are out of limit so how can i get only abnormal values.

entry.title: IE05-Characteristic is not sorted correctly
entry.content:
Hello, 

A characteristic is assigned to the Equipment class and has a numeric data type. However, when we sort this characteristic in transaction code IE05, the sorting is not working correctly.

entry.title: SAP statistical components
entry.content:
Team - I'm looking to gain more understanding in the statistical modules of SAP to develop my analytical skills so I can use in my current position as reliability engineer. Appreciated if you could please guide on this and suggest a path flow, including trainings and so that would help me on this journey.

BR

Iuri

entry.title: How to make Malfend Field mandatory before Complete the maintenance order
entry.content: How to make Malfend field mandatory before Complete the maintenance order because if malfend date & time not fill then breakdown dur not calculated.

entry.title: F3326 App shows created by field as blank
entry.content:
Hi All,

Manage Schedule (F3326) Fiori app is showing created by field as blank. ￼

How can we populate created by field?

@Pete @VaibhavP @SAP @Erwin @Asish7 

SAP EAM Work Order

entry.title: add fields Storage Bin (LGPBE), Unrestricted (LABST) on output screen of tile IH01.
entry.content:
We need suitable BADI, user exit or implicit enhancement to add fields Storage Bin (LGPBE), Unrestricted (LABST) on output screen of tile IH01.

Please find below in detail analysis done by our technical team:

We cannot use BADI EAML_MULTILEVEL_LIST due to the framework deactivation, its risky to activate as it may affect the business process. Also, in some cases the activated object cannot be reverted.

We don't want to add fields to Structure : STPOX, RIHSTPO in implicit enhancement Function module : CS_BOM_EXPL_TPL_V1,CS_BOM_EXPL_EQU_V2 as STPOX Structure changes may affect the BOM related scenarios as this structure have been used in some other BOM programs.

entry.title: Set Work Order duration on Maintenance Plan
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm having trouble understanding Maintenance Plans.

Here's what I need:

I'm trying to create a Maintenance Plan that cycles every three years. I need a Work Order to be generated halfway through the cycle. This Work Order should remain open throughout the second half of the cycle, allowing for flexible completion. Here's an example:

  • April 8, 2025: Start of the cycle.
  • 1.5 years later (October 8, 2026): Work Order created with Scheduled Start: October 8, 2026, and Scheduled End: April 8, 2028.
  • 1.5 years later (April 8, 2028): End of the cycle and start of a new one. The Work Order should be completed by this time.

What I've done:

I set up a Maintenance Plan with a three-year cycle and a 50% Call Horizon. The Work Order is generated on October 8, 2026, as intended, but the Scheduled Start and Scheduled End are both set to April 8, 2028, which is not what I need.

I hope this explanation is clear. Thank you for your time!

entry.title: IW40 gives whitelist error
entry.content:
I am trying to view the sub-orders for the order created via IW40 but when executed, I am getting an error message that "the value is not in the whitelist".

Its the same case when i try to check the sub-orders via IW33 -> Extras -> Sub-Orders -> Overview.

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in Advance,

Ajay

entry.title: No print output appear when we use the tcode S010 in the template and connected to CA10
entry.content:
Can someone help me with my query, after i followed the steps in using tcode SO10 and connect it to CA10, it seems working fine. we can see the template created using the print preview but when we tried to print it out its not included on a printed paper.

 

Reference:

Update text from Std text key in task list - SAP Community

Update in Task List after change in Standard Text ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Asset Manager - Maintenance order with more than 1 responsible
entry.content:
Hey everyone,
In a maintenance order we have a person responsible for each operation, totaling 3 responsible, but this order is not enough for any of them in the Asset Manager mobile. 
Would this be a matter of configuration? Or in the asset manager the order only appears to one person in charge? 


Many thanks for support,

Regards,
Nathalie Fernandes

entry.title: Goods Receipt of a material
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we do goods receipt of a material for an existing equipment does the equipment need to be in store?

Thanks & Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Conditions to do GR of an existing equipment for a material
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Other than refurbishment under what conditions do we do goods receipt of an existing equipment for a material?

Regards,

Priti

entry.title: Status of equipment after GR
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we do goods receipt of an equipment for a material can the equipment directly have the status AVLB?

Regards,

Priti
